message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Sequence Diagram

participant "GameController" as GC
participant "Player" as P
participant "Die" as D

activate GC
autonumber
GC -> GC: Start
GC -> P: Create
activate P
P -> D: Create
activate D
loop PlayerMoney<3000
    P -> D: Roll
end
P --> GC: Win Message
deactivate D
deactivate P
deactivate GC

@enduml
```
